scripts.build: rm -rf dist/blobs && bun build src/blobs/server.ts --target=bun --outfile dist/blobs/server.mjs
scripts.deploy: pnpm turbo run build --filter @prisma/example-storage... && ( set -a; . "${PRISMA_DEPLOY_ENV:-../../.env}"; set +a; bun node_modules/.bin/prisma-composer deploy module.ts ${STORAGE_STACK_NAME:+--name "$STORAGE_STACK_NAME"} )
scripts.destroy: ( set -a; . "${PRISMA_DEPLOY_ENV:-../../.env}"; set +a; bun node_modules/.bin/prisma-composer destroy module.ts --production ${STORAGE_STACK_NAME:+--name "$STORAGE_STACK_NAME"} )
